Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify SILJ Covered Call ETF (SLJY)

holdings.infoBox: SLJY is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amplify Junior Silver Miners ETF stock at 24.56%, First Majestic Silver at 7.44%, Hecla Mining Company at 7.33%, McEwen at 6.49%, and Seabridge Gold Inc Ordinary Shares - New at 6.12%.

overview.description: The Amplify SILJ Junior Silver Miners Covered Call ETF (SLJY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund provides exposure to junior silver mining companies while employing a covered call strategy to generate additional income. SLJY was launched on Aug 18, 2025 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
